title: Legacy Worlds
description: The Legacy Console Edition mash-up worlds ported to Java Edition, for use with the Legacy4J mod.
body:
# Legacy Worlds

Legacy Worlds is a resource pack that brings all the beloved Minecraft Legacy Console Edition mash-up pack worlds to Java Edition! Designed for use with the [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) or [World Templates ](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-templates) mod. It does not include the mash-up packs themselves—they can be downloaded separately [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/pmzubVQQ) for full functionality.

![World Creation Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IFQ5IZDt/images/ca1c9d539059ff04411b8d2729c4d4f51d98bfe3.png)

<details open>
<summary>Worlds</summary>
  
- Toy Story World
- Steven Universe World
- The Nightmare Before Christmas World
- Pirates Of The Caribbean World
- Egyptian Mythology World
- Norse Mythology World
- Adventure Time World
- Fallout World
- Chinese Mythology World
- Greek Mythology World
- Festive World
- Skyrim World
- Mass Effect World
- LittleBigPlanet World
- Super Mario World
- Halloween World
- Halo World

</details>
